Sabka Malik Ek.
Why fear when I am here?
Have faith and patience.
Trust in me, and your prayers shall be answered.
Allah Malik.
Do your duty and leave the rest to me.
If you look to me, I look to you.
Seek my blessings and I will carry your burdens.
Be wherever you like, do whatever you choose, remember this well that all what you do is known to me.
I am formless and everywhere. I am in everything and beyond.
No harm shall come to him who sets his foot on the mosque and temple.
Unless there is some relationship or connection, nobody goes anywhere.
I give you what you want, so that you may want what I want to give.
Surrender yourself completely to the Lord's will, and with His blessing, even an ant can kill an elephant.
Real happiness lies in making others happy.
Faith and Patience - these two things will take you through everything.
Baba's grace is with you, always and forever.
Offer your mind to me and be free from worry.
Turn your worry into worship, and watch him turn your battles into blessings.
The mind that is attached to worldly things is like a monkey that jumps from branch to branch.
Before you speak, ask yourself: Is it kind, is it necessary, is it true?
Love one another and help others to rise to the higher levels, simply by pouring out love.
I am the slave of my devotee. I am always with him wherever he may be.
The best way to find God is to find Him in your heart.
God has no form, no name, no religion. He is everywhere, in everything.
Help ever, hurt never.
Work is worship. Do your work with devotion and dedication.
The path of devotion is the easiest path to reach God.
Your duty is to do your best and leave the rest to God.
When you surrender to God, He takes care of everything.
The greatest prayer is patience and faith.
Be content with what you have, and God will give you what you need.
Service to humanity is service to God.
The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
Prayer is not asking for what you want, but accepting what God gives.
God's grace is like the ocean. The more you take, the more it remains.
True devotion is not about rituals, but about love and compassion.
The heart that loves is always young.
Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
God is the doer, you are the instrument. Do your duty and leave the rest to Him.
The way to God is through love, not through fear.
When you have faith, you have everything.
God's love is unconditional. He loves you just as you are.
The purpose of life is to realize God within yourself.
Be humble, be kind, be compassionate. This is the path to God.
God's will is always for your highest good, even when you cannot see it.
The more you give, the more you receive. This is God's law.
Trust in God's timing. Everything happens at the right moment.
Your faith can move mountains. Believe in the power of prayer.
God is always with you, even in your darkest moments.
The greatest gift you can give is love.
When you serve others, you serve God.
God's grace is sufficient for all your needs.
The path to God is through selfless service and devotion.
Have patience. God's plan is always perfect.
The more you surrender, the more God takes care of you.
God's love is like the sun. It shines on everyone equally.
True happiness comes from within, not from external things.
When you pray with faith, miracles happen.
God is the source of all strength. Turn to Him in times of need.
The heart that is pure sees God everywhere.
Love is the highest form of worship.
God's blessings are infinite. There is always enough for everyone.
When you trust God completely, He guides your path.
The purpose of suffering is to bring you closer to God.
God's mercy is greater than any sin.
Be grateful for what you have, and God will give you more.
The way to peace is through acceptance and surrender.
God's plan is always better than your plan.
When you love God, you love everyone.
The greatest miracle is the transformation of the heart.
God's presence is felt in the silence of the heart.
The more you meditate, the closer you get to God.
God's love is the only thing that truly satisfies.
When you serve with love, you become one with God.
The path of devotion is the sweetest path to God.
God's grace transforms everything it touches.
The heart that is open to God receives His blessings.
When you trust in God, you have nothing to fear.
God's love is the light that guides you through darkness.
The more you give to God, the more He gives to you.
True devotion is seeing God in everyone and everything.
God's will is always perfect, even when it doesn't make sense.
The way to God is through love, service, and surrender.
When you pray with a pure heart, God listens.
God's blessings flow to those who are grateful.
The purpose of life is to love God and serve others.
God's grace is always available. You just need to ask.
The more you surrender, the more peace you find.
God's love is unconditional and eternal.
When you have faith, you have everything you need.
The path to God is through the heart, not the mind.
God's timing is always perfect. Trust in His plan.
The greatest prayer is to be present with God.
When you love God, you naturally love all of creation.
God's mercy is greater than His justice.
The way to happiness is through service and devotion.
God's grace is sufficient for all your needs.
The more you trust God, the more He takes care of you.
True peace comes from surrendering to God's will.
God's love is the foundation of everything.
When you serve others, you serve God Himself.
The path to God is through love, not through knowledge.
God's blessings are always available. You just need to receive them.
The heart that is pure sees God in everything.
When you trust God, you have no worries.
God's grace transforms the ordinary into the extraordinary.
The more you give, the more you receive from God.
True devotion is living in constant awareness of God.
God's will is always for your highest good.
The way to God is through the path of love and service.
When you pray with faith, God answers in His own way.
God's love is the greatest power in the universe.
The more you surrender, the more God works through you.
True happiness comes from being in God's presence.
God's grace is always with you, even when you don't feel it.
The path to God is through the heart, not through the intellect.
When you love God, you become one with Him.
God's blessings flow to those who are open to receive them.
The purpose of life is to realize your oneness with God.
God's love is the light that dispels all darkness.
When you trust in God, you have nothing to lose.
The more you meditate on God, the more you become like Him.
God's grace is the greatest gift you can receive.
True devotion is seeing God in everyone you meet.
God's will is always perfect, even when it's difficult to understand.
The way to God is through love, service, and surrender to His will.
